  • Constructor Details

    • BookingDAO

      public BookingDAO()

  • Method Details

    • createBooking

      public boolean createBooking(Booking booking)
      Creates a new booking, inserts participants, and decrements available seats in a single database transaction.
      Parameters:
      booking - Booking object containing participants and schedule info
      Returns:
      true if successful, false if failed or if there are not enough seats

    • getBookingsByCustomerId

      public List<Booking> getBookingsByCustomerId(int customerId)
      Gets booking list for a specific customer.
      Parameters:
      customerId - customer user ID
      Returns:
      list of bookings

    • getBookingByCode

      public Booking getBookingByCode(String bookingCode)
      Gets details of a booking using its unique booking code.
      Parameters:
      bookingCode - unique booking code
      Returns:
      Booking object with participants loaded, or null if not found

    • updateBookingStatus

      public boolean updateBookingStatus(int bookingId, String status)
      Updates booking status (e.g. Confirmed, Cancelled, Completed).
      Parameters:
      bookingId - booking ID
      status - new status
      Returns:
      true if updated, false otherwise
